description_long: This is a classical-style marble bust depicting the head and upper shoulders of a young man with curly hair. The sculpture is missing the top portion of the head, revealing a hollow interior, and the nose appears to be partially broken. The facial features are finely detailed, with deep-set eyes, defined cheekbones, and a slightly parted mouth. The hair is intricately carved, forming tight curls that frame the face and extend to the sides. The surface shows signs of aging and weathering, with some discoloration and minor chipping, especially around the base and edges. The bust is mounted on a simple, unadorned plinth that merges seamlessly with the lower neck and shoulders.
description: A weathered marble bust of a curly-haired young man, missing the top of the head and part of the nose, with finely detailed facial features and a hollow interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, curly hair, and broken nose, with the hollow top just visible.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the intricate curls, the depth of the facial features, and the open top of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the hollowed-out top and the rough, unfinished back of the bust.
description_view_3: Right profile view displaying the textured hair, defined jawline, and the open top of the head.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
